name: Nodens
description: Personal strategic HQ: Next.js web + Node API + Postgres, currently running as ad-hoc host-network containers rather than the project's own Caddy-fronted deploy/compose.yml.

migration.rollback: Stop the ad-hoc nodens-demo-* containers on oreochiserver. The project's own deploy/compose.yml (Caddy-fronted, no directly published app ports) is the intended production path once reviewed.
notes: Running via ad-hoc docker run in host network mode, not the project's own deploy/compose.yml.
web (3000), api (3001), and postgres (5433) are all bound to 0.0.0.0; no reverse proxy or auth in front.
Postgres uses a trivial default demo username/password pair per the api container's DATABASE_URL; rotate before any access grant.
A second, unrelated container nodens-sprint55-postgres was also observed on an isolated Docker network with no host port published; likely a leftover test container, not part of this running demo.

requirements: No backup execution allowed until personal-data classification and credential rotation are reviewed.
Postgres volume is anonymous/hash-named (not compose-tracked); re-provision via deploy/compose.yml's named postgres-data volume before any backup automation.

notes: Handles personal life, work, relationship, and risk data per the project README.
Running with host network mode; web/api/postgres are all directly bound to 0.0.0.0 with no reverse proxy or auth in front.
Postgres reachable at 0.0.0.0:5433 with a trivial default demo username/password pair.
